levelList.name: 梱緊捕縄
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的[Breath]強度与<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]強度之和不低于6級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1

- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>高于<color=#ffffff>目標</color>，則額外獲得1層[Breath]

levelList.name: 斬断肌腱
